message:
refactor(storage): route pane bookmark insert/delete through cx entry

Extends the ft-xbnl0.2.3 cx-first migration to `insert_pane_bookmark` and
`delete_pane_bookmark`: under `asupersync-runtime` they now delegate to
their `_with_cx` siblings so each write passes through `send_with_cx` and
honors `cx.checkpoint()`.
